form.formComment: Hit the frame latest (18.36) when second at this track in a Grade 3/4. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and three minors. Key chance and should go close.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (23.12) when fifth over 383m at this track in a Grade 2/3. Goes very well from the draw boasting three victories and six places from 16 starts. Others appear better placed.
